tagline.en: Plant a seed taller than YOU!
tagline.da: Plant et froe der bliver hoejere end DIG!

theme.hero_task: Sow sunflower seeds in Bed A

tasks.action: Sow sunflower seeds in Bed A

prompt.en: Push the big seed into the soil with your thumb -- this will grow taller than you!
prompt.da: Tryk det store froe ned i jorden med tommelfingeren -- den bliver hoejere end dig!

prompt.en: Give each bed a good drink -- feel the soil first to check if it's dry.
prompt.da: Giv hvert bed en god slurk -- maaerk jorden foerst for at tjekke om den er toer.

tasks.action: Sow kale seeds in Bed C

prompt.en: These tiny seeds will grow into dinosaur kale -- the leaves look like dinosaur skin!
prompt.da: De her smaa froe bliver til dinosaur-groenkal -- bladene ligner dinosaurhud!

tasks.action: Thin radish seedlings in Bed A if too crowded

prompt.en: Some radishes are too close together -- pull out the smallest ones so the big ones have room.
prompt.da: Nogle radiser staar for taet -- traek de mindste op saa de store faar plads.

tasks.action: Check pea shoots for first tendrils in Bed C

prompt.en: Can you find the curly bits? Those are tendrils -- the pea is reaching for the trellis!
prompt.da: Kan du finde de krulle-ting? Det er snotraade -- aerten raekker efter espalieren!

growth_events.event: Pea seedlings showing first tendrils reaching for trellis

prompt.en: Can you find the curly bits grabbing the wire? The pea is climbing!
prompt.da: Kan du finde de krulle-ting, der griber traaden? Aerten klatrer!

growth_events.event: Radish seedlings developing first true leaves

prompt.en: See the rough new leaves? Those are the real leaves -- the round ones were just the starter pack!
prompt.da: Ser du de ru nye blade? Det er de rigtige blade -- de runde var bare startpakken!

sowing_tasks.action: Sow second succession radish in Bed C
